title: lithocarpus wallichianus
intro: Lithocarpus wallichianus, also known as the Himalayan lirodo or Himalayan evergreen oak, is a species of evergreen tree native to the Himalayas and parts of Southeast Asia. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Lithocarpus wallichianus include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the bark and leaves of this plant are often used to make teas, tinctures, and decoctions, which are traditionally used to promote overall well-being and boost the immune system.
